documents.title: Project Overview
documents.content:
Project Overview

DevBoard is a thinking canvas for solo devs — a place to capture ideas, connect them, and ship faster.

Goals

See [[Tech Stack]] for the full technology breakdown. The main design decisions are captured in canvas nodes on the Roadmap page.

The feature sticky @node:sticky-shipping covers our export and sharing strategy.

Status

MVP is in progress. Next milestone: launch on itch.io. Sprint details are in [[Sprint Notes]].

documents.title: Tech Stack
documents.content:
Tech Stack

This document covers all technologies used in DevBoard.

Frontend

  • React 18 + TypeScript — UI layer
  • react-konva — canvas rendering
  • Zustand — state management (localStorage persistence)
  • Tailwind CSS v3 — UI chrome

Build

  • Vite + vite-plugin-singlefile — produces a single dist/index.html

Related

See [[Project Overview]] for context. The canvas node @node:sticky-tech has more architecture notes.

documents.title: Sprint Notes
documents.content:
Sprint Notes — Week 17

This week's focus: document system + workspace support.

Done

  • Document mode with rich text editing
  • Wikilinks [[Project Overview]] working in editor
  • Node pills @node:sticky-shipping showing canvas context
  • Workspace save/load round-trips documents correctly

Up Next

See [[Tech Stack]] for components that still need attention. The @node:sticky-tech canvas note has the architecture decisions.
